<!-- What problem does this idea solve? What motivated you to propose this? -->

<!-- Describe your idea in detail. How would it work? What would it look like? -->

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, why do you prefer your proposed solution? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, examples, or references that support your idea. -->
